title: rosmarinus officinalis var. flexuosus
intro: Rosmarinus officinalis var. flexuosus, also known as Lemon Rosemary, is a variant of the rosemary plant (Rosmarinus officinalis) characterized by its lemon-scented leaves and upright habit. The plant has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of compounds like camphor, bornyl acetate, and 1,8-cineole. The health benefits of Rosmarinus officinalus var. flexuosus include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function and memory, and aiding in digestion and respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, and is also used as a culinary herb to add flavor to dishes.
